name: Silly Monks Entertainment Limited
summary: Silly Monks Entertainment Limited operates as an entertainment and media company in India. It is involved in the digital media publishing; movie/series/music/other creator content production; celebrity digital management; marketing and promotion on digital and traditional mediums; content distribution and syndication on satellite channels, cinema theatres, airborne, and other offline platforms; and online/digital advertising with Google AdWords. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Hyderabad, India.
